hero.subtitle: AI-powered English learning platform for teachers. Just 2 sessions of 15 minutes a day — your personalized path to fluency.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: No decision fatigue. We plan everything. You just show up.
howItWorks.step1Desc: A 10-question adaptive test determines your CEFR level (A1–C2) and personalizes your entire 365-day journey.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Every day you get 2 sessions of 15 minutes. Writing, Listening, or AI Tutor — we decide, you execute.
howItWorks.step3Desc: See your CEFR level rise, skills radar evolve, and streak grow. Your dashboard shows every improvement.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Four core modules, powered by Claude AI

writing.title: Writing Practice
writing.description: IELTS-style essay and data description tasks. Get band scores, detailed feedback on grammar and vocabulary, and improved sentence examples — all from AI.

listening.title: Listening Practice
listening.description: AI generates relevant passages read aloud via text-to-speech. Answer comprehension questions and get instant explanations.

tutor.title: AI Tutor Chat
tutor.description: Your personal English teacher available 24/7. Ask grammar questions, practice conversations, get vocabulary help. The tutor knows your level and adapts.

speaking.title: Speaking Practice
speaking.description: Coming soon — real-time pronunciation feedback, fluency scoring, and IELTS Speaking band evaluation.

cefr.title: Adaptive to Your Level
cefr.subtitle: Our AI adapts every exercise to your current CEFR level

cta.title: Join the English Revolution
cta.subtitle: 15 minutes a day, twice a day. That's all it takes.

landing.footer: © 2026 English Proficiency Platform · Powered by Claude AI · Built for Teachers

learningPath.title: Learning Path

learningPath.amazingWork: Amazing work! You completed today's sessions. See you tomorrow!
learningPath.startStreakDesc: Complete both sessions today to begin a streak.

tips.readAloud: Read your essay aloud after writing — it helps catch grammar errors.
tips.askGrammar: Ask your AI tutor about one grammar rule you struggle with.
tips.listenTwice: Listen to the passage twice before answering questions.
tips.usePhrases: Use phrases like "The data shows..." and "It is evident that..." in your chart description.
tips.learnWords: Learn 3 new words today and use them in a sentence.
tips.setTimer: Set a 15-minute timer and write without stopping — quantity builds fluency.
tips.reviewWeek: Review what you learned this week. What was most challenging?

writing.title: Writing Practice
writing.connectionError: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.

speaking.title: Speaking Practice
speaking.noSupport: Speech recognition is not supported in your browser. Please use Chrome.
speaking.comingSoonDesc: We're building an advanced speaking practice module with real-time voice analysis.
speaking.interimDesc: In the meantime, practice your speaking by discussing today's topics with the AI Tutor.
speaking.textModeDesc: Type your English response to the topic above. Speak out loud first, then write what you said — or type directly.
speaking.errorNetwork: Voice recognition requires Google servers (network). Switched to text input mode — type your response below.
speaking.errorNotAllowed: Microphone access denied. Allow mic in browser settings, or switch to text mode.
speaking.errorAudioCapture: No microphone detected. Switch to text mode.
speaking.errorGeneric: Speech error: {error}. Try text mode instead.

listening.title: Listening Practice
listening.playerDesc: Generate an AI-created passage, listen to it, and answer comprehension questions.
listening.errorGenerate: Failed to generate content. Please try again.

tutor.title: AI Tutor
tutor.subtitle: Ask me anything about English!
tutor.loginMessage: Please login to chat with the AI tutor.
tutor.greeting:
Hello **{name}**! 👋 I'm your AI English tutor.

I can see you're at **{level} level** — I'll adapt everything to your level.

What would you like to work on today? You can ask me about grammar, vocabulary, writing tips, or anything English-related!
tutor.suggestion2: How do I use passive voice correctly?
tutor.suggestion3: Give me 5 advanced vocabulary words for academic writing
tutor.suggestion4: What's the difference between B1 and B2 English level?
tutor.suggestion5: Can you correct this: 'Yesterday I go to school'
tutor.suggestion6: How do I improve my essay coherence?
tutor.suggestion7: What are good connective phrases for essays?
tutor.suggestion8: Explain the present perfect tense with examples

social.loginMessage: Please login to access social features.
social.noFriends: No friends yet. Search and add someone!
social.shareText: {name} is at {level} level on EnglishPro! Writing: {writing}/9 · Speaking: {speaking}% · Listening: {listening}%
